stdin_parsed.last_assistant_message:
Script updated. Key changes vs v1:

- **Removes** `nvidia-utils 595`, `lib32-nvidia-utils 595`, `libxnvctrl 595`, `opencl-nvidia 595` — kernel module + userspace must version-match, can't mix 470xx module with 595 userspace
- **Installs** full 470xx stack from AUR via `yay`: `nvidia-470xx-dkms`, `nvidia-470xx-utils`, `lib32-nvidia-470xx-utils`, `libxnvctrl-470xx`
- Root cause in comment: Arch dropped closed-source modules from official repos entirely

Run `setup-driver-nvidia` again. Will take longer — AUR packages build from source.

**CUDA 13 caveat:** `cuda 13.2.1` on your system won't function — that needs driver ≥ 570.x which requires Turing+. GP107 can't do it. CUDA 11.4 max with 470xx.
